## Summary

- what changed
- which package or packages changed
- why the change belongs in extras

## Checks

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] Added a Changeset if a published package changed

## Release Impact

- list the affected packages
- mention whether the change is patch, minor, or major in intent
